name: Berkshire Hathaway
confidenceReason: Ultimate defensive safe harbor with $380B+ cash fortress providing unmatched optionality.
bullCase: The ultimate defensive safe harbor. Trading at a reasonable 1.5x book value, the company's vast cash reserves provide unmatched optionality. The potential initiation of a dividend or massive buybacks under the Greg Abel era serves as a strong forward catalyst.
bearCase: The sheer size of the capital base ($380B+ cash) makes high-velocity geometric compounding mathematically impossible. It serves as a volatility dampener rather than a torque engine.

cagrModel.basis: Estimated compounder baseline; normalized operating EPS (excl. volatile GAAP investment mark-to-market gains/losses)

screener.note: Engine corrected tPERG → fPERG (Operating Earnings basis). GAAP tPE captures volatile mark-to-market investment swings. Operating forwardPE 21.9x / 10% growth = 2.19 — correctly fails 15% hurdle. QCS -6.07 driven by GAAP noise, not structural deterioration.

description: Berkshire Hathaway Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the insurance, freight rail transportation, and utility businesses.
